'''Seef''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] of the [[intendant caste]]. She was considered beautiful, and mated with [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]]. She served as a [[Villip Mistress]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]'' {{C|Indirect mention}}
